station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, Asha Nagar, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400080
text: Total fraud pump.  My bike tank capacity is 15 liters, since I was in a hurry did not observe tap and paid and left with invoice copy. They transferred some one else's diesel invoice and charged 1500 odd something.  Once before also asked him to make tank full he stopped at 200 , on reminding him to fill it full he said sorry started refueling and and started asking for 200 + what he filled , on arguing he said sorry I forgot.  On another occasion today went for normal petrol , I was directed to another dispenser and did not observe what was being filled just checked zero.  He filled xp95 without mentioning that he was filling xp 95.  Never in my life will go again to this pump.

station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, Asha Nagar, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400080
text: I’ve been regularly filling up at this petrol pump and the experience has always been smooth. The staff are courteous and usually quick, even during busy hours. Fuel quality is reliable, and they don’t push unnecessary services. The air-filling station and other basic amenities are also well-maintained. It's a trustworthy place — glad to have it nearby.

station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, Asha Nagar, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400080
text:
The pucc centre inside this station is run by frauds, try avoiding it . My puc failed due to their issue and I was later sent an edited pdf which never updated in vahan website . Upon asking I was told it will be updated in 24 hours and what not which never happened.
Took another puc test from a different centre and everything worked fine .
Bunch of cheaters they are and the worst is,  they charge you 170 for four wheelers under the name of lamination. Not sure why one need laminated paper. If no lamination , they will charge you 150/-.

Fyi, puc for four wheeler is 125/-

Happening at the centre inside the fuel station openly says everyone is a part of this scam .
